<?php /** * League.Uri (https://uri.thephpleague.com) * * (c) Ignace Nyamagana Butera <nyamsprod@gmail.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace League\Uri\Contracts; interface Transformable { /** * Apply a transformation to this instance and return a new instance. * * This method MUST retain the state of the current instance, and return * a new instance of the same type. * * @param callable(static): static $callback */ public function transform(callable $callback): static; }
